title: Mojo v1.0.0b1 发布
summary: Mojo 是一种面向 AI/ML 开发的新型编程语言，旨在结合 Python 的易用性与 C 的性能。v1.0.0b1 版本标志着其首个公开测试版，提供了用于高性能计算和 AI 工作负载的完整功能集。Mojo is a new programming language for AI/ML development, aiming to combine Python's ease of use with C's performance. The v1.0.0b1 release marks its first public beta, offering a full feature set for high-performance computing and AI workloads.
